channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: How to Use Absher: Complete Guide for Residents
item.description: A practical English guide to using Saudi Arabia's Absher platform: registration, login, residency renewal, traffic fines, visas, and common fixes.

item.title: 10 Best Places to Visit in Saudi Arabia
item.description: Discover the best places to visit in Saudi Arabia, from AlUla and Historic Jeddah to Asir, Riyadh, the Red Sea, and the Edge of the World.

item.title: Best Restaurants in Riyadh: A Food Lover's Guide
item.description: From Najdi classics to fine dining, discover the best restaurants in Riyadh. A practical guide for visitors, residents, and curious eaters.

item.title: Edge of the World: A Natural Wonder Near Riyadh
item.description: Discover Edge of the World near Riyadh, a dramatic Saudi cliff overlook with endless plains. Your guide to visiting, hiking, and photography.

item.title: Kingdom Tower: Riyadh's Iconic Skyscraper
item.description: Kingdom Tower is Riyadh's most recognizable skyscraper. Explore its design, the Sky Bridge, and why it matters to modern Saudi Arabia.

item.title: How to Open a Bank Account in Saudi Arabia
item.description: How to open a bank account in Saudi Arabia: required documents, resident and visitor cases, bank choices, digital steps, fees, and common mistakes.

item.title: Pearl Diving in Saudi Arabia: A Lost Heritage
item.description: Pearl diving once shaped life on the Saudi Gulf coast. Discover the history, dangers, and legacy of this vanished maritime industry.

item.title: Qiddiya: Saudi Arabia's Entertainment City
item.description: Qiddiya is Saudi Arabia's planned entertainment, sports, and arts city near Riyadh. Learn about its districts, timeline, and Vision 2030 role.

item.title: How to Use Qiyas: Saudi Testing Platform Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Saudi Arabia's Qiyas testing platform: registration, test booking, payment, results, required documents, and common issues.

item.title: Qobool Guide: Saudi Unified Admission Platform
item.description: How to use Saudi Arabia's Qobool unified university admission platform: registration, Absher verification, preferences, results, and official links.

item.title: Riyadh Season: What It Is and What to Expect
item.description: Riyadh Season is one of the biggest entertainment festivals in the region. Learn about its zones, events, tickets, and role in Saudi Vision 2030.

item.title: Ronaldo in Saudi Arabia: Impact and Change
item.description: Explore Cristiano Ronaldo’s move to Al Nassr, its impact on Saudi football, the Saudi Pro League, tourism, media attention, and sports business.

item.title: History of Saudi Arabia: From Diriyah to Today
item.description: Trace the history of Saudi Arabia from Diriyah and the first Saudi state to unification, oil, modernization, and Vision 2030.

item.title: Saudi Driving License: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: A practical guide to getting or renewing a Saudi driving license: eligibility, documents, driving school, medical check, tests, costs, and renewal.

item.title: Saudi Football: How It Became a Global Force
item.description: Follow the rise of Saudi football, from early clubs and World Cup moments to Vision 2030, star signings, stadiums, and the Saudi Pro League.

item.title: Health Insurance in Saudi Arabia: Practical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to health insurance in Saudi Arabia: mandatory coverage, plan types, providers, costs, resident tips, and official sources.

item.title: Saudi National Day: What It Celebrates and Why It Matters
item.description: Learn what Saudi National Day on September 23 celebrates, how the Kingdom was unified in 1932, and why the holiday matters today.

item.title: Why Saudi Arabia Has No Permanent Rivers
item.description: Saudi Arabia has no permanent rivers. Learn why the climate and geography make rivers impossible, and how the Kingdom gets its water instead.

item.title: Things To Do in Dubai: A Year-Round Weekly Guide
item.description: Discover the best things to do in Dubai any week of the year. From brunches and beach clubs to concerts, markets, and free activities — a sustainable year-round guide.

item.title: Arabic Facebook Ads Guide: Target Arab Professionals
item.description: Master Facebook ads for Arab professionals. Learn audience targeting, Arabic copywriting, cultural best practices, budget optimization, and case studies.
